title: The Big One — Beta
changes: Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks — full magic system with spell scrolls, staffs, and spellbooks
Occultism — spirit binding, dimensional storage, ritual crafting
Malum — soul-infused crafting with soulwood, runewood, and spirit imbuing
Forbidden & Arcanus — arcane gold, stellarite, dragon scales, dark magic
Mekanism Tools + Additions — osmium and refined obsidian gear
Immersive Petroleum — oil drilling, fuel production, pump jacks
Simply Swords — unique weapon types with special abilities
Deeper and Darker — Warden-tier dimension with sculk progression
Sound Physics Remastered — realistic 3D audio with reverb and occlusion
Simple Voice Chat — proximity voice chat for multiplayer
L'Ender's Cataclysm — new bosses and dungeon content
Mutant Monsters — mutant zombie, skeleton, creeper, enderman variants
Create addons: Connected, Enchantment Industry, Jetpack, Diesel Generators, Deco, Slice & Dice
YUNG's Better: End Island, Jungle Temples, Mineshafts, Ocean Monuments, Witch Huts, Bridges, Extras
Terralith + Tectonic — 100+ new biomes and terrain generation
Dungeons and Taverns + Adventure Dungeons — new structures everywhere
Guard Villagers, Improved Mobs, Enderman Overhaul, Traveler's Backpack, and more
--- EMC ECONOMY REWORK ---
19,697 total EMC entries (up from 19,522)
25% transmutation tax (covalenceLoss = 0.75) — no more free EMC cycling
175 new entries for v2.0 mods (Iron's Spells, Occultism, Malum, Forbidden & Arcanus, Mekanism Tools)
RM/DM armor values corrected (were accidentally inflated 60x)
EMC generation guide: docs/emc-generation-guide.md
--- QUESTS ---
493 total quests (up from 433)
New chapter: Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks (25 quests — scroll to legendary progression)
New chapter: Occultism (20 quests — spirits, rituals, dimensional storage)
New chapter: Malum (15 quests — soulwood to dark altar mastery)
New chapter: The MadGod's Trial (15 endgame quests with branching paths)
New group: Magic & Exploration
MadGod narration added to 16 key quests across all chapters
--- KEYBINDS ---
15 keybind conflicts resolved across 261 mods
Default keybinds ship with the pack (options.txt)
Iron's Spells Cast → Mouse 4, Curios → G, Ars Nouveau → C
